name: protein_name
definition: The name or identifier of the protein being studied
rationale: Essential identifier needed to distinguish different proteins in the research

name: protein_sequence
definition: The amino acid sequence of the protein or relevant domain
rationale: Core structural information needed for protein analysis and comparison

name: has_nes
definition: Whether the protein contains a nuclear export signal (NES)
rationale: Primary binary classification for NES presence

name: nes_strength
definition: The strength or activity level of the nuclear export signal
rationale: Quantitative measure of NES functionality when present
